# DkZ™ Free AI Hub

> 19 kostenlose KI-Provider. 50 Modelle. 10 Tabs. $0.00 Kosten.
> URL: http://localhost:3040/hub/ | https://ui.devkitz.eu/hub/

## Überblick
Das Free AI Hub ist eine zentrale Weboberfläche für kostenlose KI-Dienste.
Es aggregiert 19 Provider in 10 spezialisierten Tabs und bietet Multi-Provider
Cascade-Routing über das DkZ Gateway (Port 3040).

## Provider
- VPS Ollama: qwen3:14b, qwen3:4b, gemma3:4b (eigene GPU)
- Groq: llama-3.3-70b, gemma2-9b, mixtral-8x7b (300 tok/s)
- Cerebras: llama-3.3-70b, qwen-3-32b (schnellstes Inference)
- SambaNova: Llama-3.3-70B, DeepSeek-R1 (Enterprise Free)
- OpenRouter: qwen3-coder:free, deepseek-r1:free, gpt-oss-120b:free
- GitHub Models: gpt-4o-mini, Llama-3.3-70B, Mistral-large
- HuggingFace: Qwen3-8B, SDXL, MMS-TTS, Whisper, TrOCR
- Google AI Studio: gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-pro
- Mistral: mistral-nemo, mistral-small
- Pollinations: FLUX, SDXL, Turbo (kein API-Key nötig!)
- NVIDIA NIM: Nemotron-120B, Gemma-3-27B
- Whisper STT: whisper-large-v3, whisper-medium, seamlessM4T
- TrOCR/GOT-OCR: TrOCR-large, GOT-OCR2, Qwen2-VL
- MusicGen: MusicGen-Large, AudioCraft, AudioLDM2
- Suno AI: Suno-V5, Suno-V4.5 (Songs mit Vocals)
- Sound FX AI: AudioLDM2, Bark, Stable-Audio
- DeepSeek R1: DeepSeek-R1, DeepSeek-V3 (Reasoning)
- QwQ Research: QwQ-32B (Chain-of-Thought)
- Qwen AiCo: qwen3-235b-a22b:free (E-Commerce AI)

## Tabs
1. Provider — Übersicht aller 19 Provider mit Status
2. Chat — Free LLM Chat mit 8-Provider Cascade
3. Bild — Bildgenerierung (Pollinations FLUX, HF SDXL)
4. Video — Videogenerierung (Pollinations)
5. Audio — Text-to-Speech (Browser SpeechSynthesis)
6. STT — Speech-to-Text (Whisper via HuggingFace)
7. OCR — Texterkennung aus Bildern (TrOCR, GOT-OCR)
8. Musik — Beats, Songs, SFX (MusicGen, Suno)
9. Research — Tiefenanalyse (DeepSeek-R1, QwQ, Gemini)
10. Commerce — E-Commerce Assistent (Qwen AiCo)

## API Endpoints
- POST /api/v1/free-hub/cascade — Auto-Routing durch 4 Free Provider
- POST /api/v1/chat — Spezifischer Provider-Chat
- POST /api/v1/seo/social-audit — OG/Twitter/Schema Validierung
- POST /api/v1/seo/business-audit — Business SEO Analyse
- POST /api/v1/seo/ai-audit — AI-SEO + Heading + Content Check
- POST /api/v1/seo/full-audit — Kombinierte Analyse (Grade A+ bis D)
- GET /api/v1/health — Gateway Health Check

## Shortcuts
- Ctrl+T — TestStraße Panel öffnen/schließen
- Enter — Nachricht/Prompt senden (in jedem Tab)

## Installation
```bash
cd C:\DEVKiTZ\ONTHERUN
npm install
npm run gateway
# → http://localhost:3040/hub/
```

## Einbindung in andere Projekte
```html
<iframe src="http://localhost:3040/hub/" width="100%" height="800"></iframe>
```

## Terminal-Nutzung
```bash
# Chat (Cascade)
curl -X POST http://localhost:3040/api/v1/free-hub/cascade -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"message\":\"Hallo\"}"

# SEO Full-Audit
curl -X POST http://localhost:3040/api/v1/seo/full-audit -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"url\":\"https://example.com\"}"

# Health Check
curl http://localhost:3040/api/v1/health
```

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML5 + CSS3 + JavaScript ES6+
- Backend: Node.js + Express (ONTHERUN Gateway Port 3040)
- APIs: HuggingFace Inference, Pollinations, OpenRouter Free, Groq Free
- Design: DkZ Design System v2, Inter + JetBrains Mono
- Tests: TestStraße v3.0.0 (50+ automatische Checks)
